title: Second Battle of Sernpidal
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Battle |prev=[[Invasion of Yavin 4]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' |conc= |next=[[Battle of Yag'Dhul (26 ABY)|Battle of Yag'Dhul]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' |image=[[File:Secondbattleofsernpidal.jpg]] |name=Second Battle of Sernpidal |conflict=[[Yuuzhan Vong War]] |date=[[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] |place=[[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]] |result=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] victory *Remnants of Sernpidal destroyed |side1=New Republic rogue forces |side2=[[Yuuzhan Vong]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1= *[[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] *[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Traest Kre'fey]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*''[[Ralroost]]'' *1 [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] *1 [[Heavy cruiser/Legends|heavy cruiser]] *2 [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] *[[Kyp's Dozen]] *[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] *''Ralroost'' [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] |forces2=*[[Yorik-et|Coralskippers]] *4 capital ships *1 [[shipwomb]] *1 unfinished civilian [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Immobilizer 418 cruiser *[[Rogue Three/Legends|Rogue Three]] *[[Rogue Four/Legends|Rogue Four]] *[[Rogue Ten/Legends|Rogue Ten]] *[[Rogue Eight/Legends|Rogue Eight]] damaged *5 of Kyp's Dozen |casual2=Heavy |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|There's more to this universe than Jaina Solo, believe it or not. I'm sorry you feel used, and I wish I hadn't had to lie to you. But I did have to. You wouldn't have helped me otherwise."
"And I'll never help you again. You can count on it. If you were dying of thirst on Tatooine, I wouldn't even spit on you.|Kyp Durron and Jaina Solo|}} The '''Second Battle of Sernpidal''' took place in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. [[Kyp Durron]] had scouted out a [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] being built in the [[shipwomb]] of [[Sernpidal/Legends|Sernpidal]], and decided to destroy it, despite the fact that the worldship was to be used for non-military purposes. He showed [[Hologram/Legends|holograms]] of the site to [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]], telling her that it was a "[[gravitic superweapon]]" and asking her to approach her contacts in the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. [[Gavin Darklighter]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], and [[Traest Kre'fey]] were approached and grudgingly agreed that the weapon had to be destroyed, despite their dislike of Durron. Knowing that it would take too long and be too unsafe to approach the [[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] over this, the officers agreed to undertake it as an unofficial, below-the-scanner operation using only the forces available to them. Durron agreed to place his [[Kyp's Dozen|squadron]] under Antilles' and Krefey's joint leadership, and Darklighter volunteered [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]]. Kre'fey secured a decrepit [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]], and the strike team used it as a distraction to enter the [[Julevian system]]. There, they encountered stiff resistance, but were able to destroy the weapon. Only after the worldship was destroyed did Jaina Solo first realize there was no gravitic weapon; Durron had tricked them due to not knowing whether they would support him otherwise. Although she, Antilles, and Darklighter were angered, many of the other soldiers supported his actions. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{Mo}} *{{GamerCite|8|The Apprentice (short story)|reprint=1}} {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' {{1stID|Second Battle of Sernpidal}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{YuuzhanVongWarNav}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Sernpidal |es=Segunda Batalla de Sernpidal }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Sernpidal, Second Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Sernpidal]] [[Category:Battles of the Yuuzhan Vong War]]
